purpose: Manual review of donor changes since the last local Unica skill adaptation. This is not a checksum attestation.
summary: cc-1c-skills reviewed through cbde49efdaeec190432fdf4a53201a87e83c69de; the raw 138 watched path count was EOL/raw-wrapper/docs-heavy and is now closed by per-entry baselines.
Functional donor drift was ported for web-test, cfe-borrow, cfe-init, and form-validate through Unica boundaries.
EOL normalization, donor-only db/epf-build/web-publish capabilities, generated port branches, and raw PowerShell wrapper churn were reviewed as outside the current packaged Unica surface.
ai-rules-1c guidance drift remains a separate prompt-guidance review: 23 commits, 36 watched changed paths, 17 affected Unica skills.
v8-runner-rust remains clean at the locked v0.5.1 baseline.

decisionPolicy.baselineRule: Move an entry baseline only after the corresponding local skill adaptation or explicit ignore decision is reviewed.

queues.notes: MCP-level support guard for mutators and help-add is ported. Remaining work is an explicit support-edit capability/flow, which is not a packaged skill today.
Current cbde49 Shirokov functional drift is closed. Remaining command-surface work is product-scoped donor-only capability selection, not accidental upstream drift.

upstreams.baselineReason: Donor head at or before local adaptation commit 795505f2243cf3c93a95918467f99135af758e1b (2026-05-04T07:38:11+07:00).
upstreams.finding: Functional cbde49 donor drift was ported for web-test, cfe-borrow, cfe-init, and form-validate; remaining changed watched paths were reviewed as EOL/raw-wrapper/docs-only or donor-only scope and ignored with reasons.

Ported functional cbde49 drift: wide-grid selection clicks the first visible text cell, structured {column:value} matching prefers exact hits, not-found/not-selectable errors carry visibleSample, and fillTableRow exits before tabbing past a completed row.

upstreams.baselineReason: Latest donor commit before local guidance adaptation commits 40d86774d8c21f41c1adeecec696abb039c9bda2 and e5b4eeab4dac92e0c9f60d3f886aa2bb7ef79f80 (2026-05-04).
upstreams.finding: Guidance drift affects all tracked ai-rules-derived skills. Notable additions include MCP-first search guidance, verification/checkmcp/doctor commands, async jobs, locks and transactions, logging, DCS, extension patterns, and updated mcp-1c-tools docs.

upstreams.baselineReason: Bundled tool baseline from third-party/tools.lock.json, sourceTag v0.5.1.
upstreams.finding: Reviewed v0.5.1 runtime changes. It adds a version command and keeps partial-load/build behavior inside the runner contract; Unica MCP still uses typed unica.runtime.execute without new raw flags.

completedQueues.notes: Ported regression runner, split CLI/DOM/engine modules, grid pagination, picture columns, spreadsheet drill-down, multi-context tests, and report formats; adapted bootstrap guidance to Unica autonomous-server and removed prompt-visible donor URLs.

Ported SKD DSL/reference updates, Raw query export, value-list/availableValue parameter editing, @once patch-query, and donor-compatible SKD scripts behind typed unica.skd.* hidden legacy adapters; no donor URLs or raw script routing were added to prompt-visible skills.

Ported Form DSL/reference updates and donor-compatible form add/compile/edit/info/remove/validate scripts behind typed unica.form.* hidden legacy adapters; prompt-visible skills route only through MCP and references use Unica wording.

Ported meta-info reference presentation output and meta-compile ChoiceHistoryOnInput through typed unica.meta.* and parity fixtures; current support-state/support-guard donor drift after ae824 remains a separate backlog.
Ported read-only support-state reporting from Ext/ParentConfigurations.bin through shared native Unica parser and typed info tools; support-guard and support-edit remain separate backlog items.

Ported donor support guard into the Unica MCP application layer instead of copying it into every script. Guard covers direct XML/DSL mutators with ParentConfigurations.bin rules and editingAllowedCheck deny|warn|off; template-remove wrapper drift is ignored as not applicable to typed MCP routing, while Unica still guards removal of owner metadata.

Ported the only functional remaining validation drift, meta-validate pipe-separated batch mode, through native unica.meta.validate. Reviewed remaining CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR wrapper guidance diffs as not applicable to Unica MCP/package routing.

Ported help-add from a packaged local script flow to typed native unica.help.add. Support guard is applied at the Unica MCP boundary, packaged skill-local scripts were removed, and the donor Python script is retained only as test parity evidence.
Ported functional drift for web-test, cfe-borrow, cfe-init, and form-validate; reviewed EOL-only/raw-wrapper/docs-only and donor-only changes as ignored for the current Unica packaged surface.
